name: Solidtime
description: A simple, secure, and private time tracking app
compose:
name: slashnode-solidtime
services:
  app:
    image: solidtime/solidtime:0.15.1
    container_name: solidtime-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      CONTAINER_MODE: http
      AUTO_DB_MIGRATE: 'true'
      APP_NAME: solidtime
      VITE_APP_NAME: solidtime
      APP_ENV: production
      APP_DEBUG: 'false'
      APP_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8770
      APP_FORCE_HTTPS: 'false'
      TRUSTED_PROXIES: 0.0.0.0/0,2000:0:0:0:0:0:0:0/3
      SUPER_ADMINS: umbrel@umbrel.local
      LOG_CHANNEL: stderr_daily
      LOG_LEVEL: debug
      DB_CONNECTION: pgsql
      DB_HOST: solidtime-db
      DB_PORT: '5432'
      DB_SSLMODE: require
      DB_DATABASE: solidtime
      DB_USERNAME: solidtime
      DB_PASSWORD: solidtime
      MAIL_MAILER: smtp
      MAIL_HOST: ''
      MAIL_PORT: ''
      MAIL_ENCRYPTION: tls
      MAIL_FROM_ADDRESS: no-reply@your-domain.com
      MAIL_FROM_NAME: solidtime
      MAIL_USERNAME: ''
      MAIL_PASSWORD: ''
      QUEUE_CONNECTION: database
      FILESYSTEM_DISK: local
      PUBLIC_FILESYSTEM_DISK: public
      GOTENBERG_URL: http://solidtime-gotenberg:3000
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/var/www/html/storage
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8770:8000
  scheduler:
    image: solidtime/solidtime:0.15.1
    container_name: solidtime-scheduler
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      CONTAINER_MODE: scheduler
      APP_NAME: solidtime
      VITE_APP_NAME: solidtime
      APP_ENV: production
      APP_DEBUG: 'false'
      APP_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8770
      APP_FORCE_HTTPS: 'false'
      TRUSTED_PROXIES: 0.0.0.0/0,2000:0:0:0:0:0:0:0/3
      SUPER_ADMINS: umbrel@umbrel.local
      LOG_CHANNEL: stderr_daily
      LOG_LEVEL: debug
      DB_CONNECTION: pgsql
      DB_HOST: solidtime-db
      DB_PORT: '5432'
      DB_SSLMODE: require
      DB_DATABASE: solidtime
      DB_USERNAME: solidtime
      DB_PASSWORD: solidtime
      MAIL_MAILER: smtp
      MAIL_HOST: ''
      MAIL_PORT: ''
      MAIL_ENCRYPTION: tls
      MAIL_FROM_ADDRESS: no-reply@your-domain.com
      MAIL_FROM_NAME: solidtime
      MAIL_USERNAME: ''
      MAIL_PASSWORD: ''
      QUEUE_CONNECTION: database
      FILESYSTEM_DISK: local
      PUBLIC_FILESYSTEM_DISK: public
      GOTENBERG_URL: http://solidtime-gotenberg:3000
    volumes:
      - scheduler_data-app:/var/www/html/storage
  queue:
    image: solidtime/solidtime:0.15.1
    container_name: solidtime-queue
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      CONTAINER_MODE: worker
      WORKER_COMMAND: php /var/www/html/artisan queue:work
      APP_NAME: solidtime
      VITE_APP_NAME: solidtime
      APP_ENV: production
      APP_DEBUG: 'false'
      APP_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8770
      APP_FORCE_HTTPS: 'false'
      TRUSTED_PROXIES: 0.0.0.0/0,2000:0:0:0:0:0:0:0/3
      SUPER_ADMINS: umbrel@umbrel.local
      LOG_CHANNEL: stderr_daily
      LOG_LEVEL: debug
      DB_CONNECTION: pgsql
      DB_HOST: solidtime-db
      DB_PORT: '5432'
      DB_SSLMODE: require
      DB_DATABASE: solidtime
      DB_USERNAME: solidtime
      DB_PASSWORD: solidtime
      MAIL_MAILER: smtp
      MAIL_HOST: ''
      MAIL_PORT: ''
      MAIL_ENCRYPTION: tls
      MAIL_FROM_ADDRESS: no-reply@your-domain.com
      MAIL_FROM_NAME: solidtime
      MAIL_USERNAME: ''
      MAIL_PASSWORD: ''
      QUEUE_CONNECTION: database
      FILESYSTEM_DISK: local
      PUBLIC_FILESYSTEM_DISK: public
      GOTENBERG_URL: http://solidtime-gotenberg:3000
    volumes:
      - queue_data-app:/var/www/html/storage
  db:
    image: postgres:17.3
    container_name: solidtime-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PGPASSWORD: soldtime
      POSTGRES_DB: solidtime
      POSTGRES_USER: solidtime
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: solidtime
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  gotenberg:
    image: gotenberg/gotenberg:8.17.1
    container_name: solidtime-gotenberg
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-solidtime_app_data-app
  scheduler_data-app:
    name: slashnode-solidtime_scheduler_data-app
  queue_data-app:
    name: slashnode-solidtime_queue_data-app
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-solidtime_db_data-db
